description: This Java source file defines the 'OfficerService' class, which implements business logic for officer workflows in a Spring Boot application. It manages functions like retrieving application queues, getting detailed application information, and overriding decision decisions, utilizing various repositories and services.

classes.name: OfficerService
classes.description: Service class implementing officer workflow logic such as queue listing, application detail retrieval, and decision override.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Retrieves a filtered list of application queue items based on status and decision filters.

methods.name: getApplicationDetail
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific application draft, identified by UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Overrides the decision of a submitted application, records an audit event, and sends notifications to involved parties.
